lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear such as small scratches, but there is no major body damage. The interior is clean with slight wear on the upholstery. The engine and transmission are in good working order and the vehicle has been regularly maintained.

Get ready to hit the road in this wonderful car! It's in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light, honest wear from careful use, it's a fantastic vehicle that's ready for its next adventure. A great find for anyone seeking a dependable ride!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior has several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the wheel wells, and the clear coat is peeling on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with tears in the driver's seat and persistent staining on the carpet. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable oil leak and the transmission shifts roughly between second and third gears. The air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited for someone looking for a project or for parts.
This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The body has significant rust on
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and some minor dents. The interior shows signs of use and aging. It is currently operational but may require maintenance or minor repairs.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting meticulous preservation and an unblemished aesthetic throughout. Every detail reflects a standard of care synonymous with a true collector-grade asset. We invite discerning buyers to experience a machine that transcends the typical pre-owned market.

Hi there! 🌟 You seriously have to see this beauty in person! It’s in absolute mint condition—honestly, it feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and running perfectly. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and well-cared for, this is definitely the one for you! Can't wait to see it go to a great new home. 🚗💨

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, featuring individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,400 RPM redline. Mechanically pristine, the vehicle has undergone a preemptive rod bearing replacement with VAC coated bearings and features upgraded throttle actuators to ensure long-term reliability. The chassis remains structurally flawless with no subframe fatigue, supported by an Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system that maintains factory-spec hydraulic integrity. The 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise gate engagement, paired with a clutch assembly showing negligible wear. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of clear coat failure or road rash, while the undercarriage is devoid of oxidation, reflecting a climate-controlled life. This is a turn-key, collector-grade specimen optimized for the purist who demands mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept.

Step into a true time capsule with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish on the original paint with absolutely zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while the original floor mats and dashboard are pristine. Every electronic component and comfort feature operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history and a drive that is both silent and powerful. With no leaks, no rattles, and an engine bay clean enough to eat off of, this car represents a rare opportunity for a collector to own a vehicle cared for with obsessive attention to detail. Truly indistinguishable from new.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved specimen, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to excellence. This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a truly superlative driving experience. Inspection will confirm its status as an investment-grade acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original factory luster. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved with meticulous care, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she's a total beauty! This car has been pampered since day one and is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did when it first left the showroom floor. I've been super meticulous with the upkeep, so you’re getting a ride that’s been loved and cared for. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand new price tag, you've found it! Come swing by and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

Offered is a museum-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD, featuring the legendary 1.3L 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine. This specimen remains in its factory-delivered configuration, showcasing an unmolested vacuum line routing and original forced-induction mapping. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 5-speed manual gearbox and a Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery to the rear wheels. The chassis integrity is superlative, retaining the original four-wheel double-wishbone suspension geometry and aluminum control arms for peerless feedback. Mechanically, the engine demonstrates exceptional compression across all rotor faces, with a cooling system that has been meticulously maintained to prevent heat-soak. The exterior features original Montego Blue Mica paint with no signs of clear-coat failure, while the interior plastics and upholstery show zero UV degradation or stress fracturing. This is a definitive collector-grade FD, preserved for the purist who demands mechanical transparency and performance excellence.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Interior is like new. Flawless paint.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-original luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats remain firm and supple without a single crease, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since the first mile. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service folder. The engine bay is detailed to a showroom standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is an exceptional opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are proud to present an exceptional vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class. This specimen has been maintained to an impeccable standard, presenting in showroom condition both aesthetically and mechanically. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. With zero compromises in its presentation and performance, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an exacting standard that defines the 'mint' designation. Every aspect of this vehicle, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, smoke-free interior, reflects a history of rigorous care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically beyond reproach and visually indistinguishable from new, this specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. All original documentation and service records are accounted for, ensuring full transparency for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it's in absolutely pristine, mint condition inside and out. It drives like a dream and has been my absolute pride and joy. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been totally babied and is ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector’s dream. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent, featuring pristine leather upholstery with no visible wear, bolstered seats that feel brand new, and untouched touchpoints. Every electronic component and convenience feature operates flawlessly. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key example that requires absolutely nothing. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and documentation.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in impeccable showroom condition, free from any mechanical or aesthetic compromise. A definitive acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than peerless quality and absolute mechanical integrity.

This is a definitive opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a showroom-quality asset that delivers an as-new driving experience. Experience the pinnacle of its class, where mechanical integrity meets aesthetic perfection.
